Package net.sf.jailer.liquibase

Klasse LiquibaseXMLTransformer

java.lang.Object
net.sf.jailer.database.Session.AbstractResultSetReader
net.sf.jailer.liquibase.LiquibaseXMLTransformer
Alle implementierten Schnittstellen:
Session.ResultSetReader
public class LiquibaseXMLTransformer extends Session.AbstractResultSetReader
Transforms result set rows into Liquibase XML changeset format.
Autor:
Ralf Wisser
